query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM properties WHERE companyId = 'comp_baggio_001') as properties_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE companyId = 'comp_baggio_001') as sales_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commissions WHERE companyId = 'comp_baggio_001') as commissions_count;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE companyId = 'comp_baggio_001') as sales_count,
